_doc: Mile-2 §2.5 preflight — IConnectivityOracle backing symbols, dir()-confirmed against LIVE Houdini 21.0.671 (headless hython, HYTHON=Houdini 21.0.671). Read-only: a throwaway /obj net was built in an isolated hython process; the user's session was untouched. Cross-checked against the committed scout symbol table (python/synapse/cognitive/tools/data/h21_symbol_table.json, houdini_version 21.0.671). Reproduce: harness/notes/mile2_2_5_introspect.py.

symbols_PHANTOM_do_not_use.hou.NodeType.inputLabels: ABSENT in 21.0.671 dir(hou.NodeType) — input labels are INSTANCE-level only (hou.Node.inputLabels). Type-level label lookup degrades to []. P3c is advisory, so this is graceful.

verified_values.variadic_sentinel_note: Variadic max inputs reported as a large finite cap (Sop/merge=9999, Vop/add=2048), NOT -1. The validator must treat 'index < max' generically; the in-repo MOCK uses -1 as its own unlimited sentinel, so the validator also treats max<0 as unlimited. Both map to 'no overflow'.
verified_values.occupied_input_logic: merge with box wired to input0 -> inputConnections() yields one NodeConnection with inputIndex()==0. input_is_occupied(path, i) := any(c.inputIndex()==i for c in node.inputConnections()).
verified_values.vop_datatypes_precook: VopNode.inputDataTypes()/outputDataTypes() read ['undef'] on a fresh uncooked node -> NO reliable non-mutating type-level wire-compat oracle in 21.0.671. types_compatible() degrades; is_typed_category() still honest (Vop/Chop/Shop).
